company.name: AutoStream
company.tagline: Automated Video Editing Tools for Content Creators
company.description: AutoStream is a SaaS platform that provides AI-powered automated video editing tools designed to help content creators produce professional-quality videos faster and more efficiently.

policies.details: No refunds are issued after 7 days from the date of purchase. Refund requests must be made within the first 7 days.
24/7 customer support is available exclusively for Pro plan subscribers. Basic plan users receive email support with standard response times.
Edited videos are stored on AutoStream servers for 30 days. Users should download their content before this period expires.
AutoStream is intended for individual content creators. Reselling or redistributing the platform is prohibited.

faqs.question: What platforms does AutoStream support?
faqs.answer: AutoStream supports exporting content optimized for YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, Twitter/X, and Facebook. The Pro plan includes presets for each platform.

faqs.question: Can I upgrade from Basic to Pro?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can upgrade at any time. The price difference will be prorated for the remainder of your billing cycle.

faqs.question: Is there a free trial?
faqs.answer: Yes, AutoStream offers a 7-day free trial on the Pro plan with no credit card required.

faqs.question: Does AutoStream support team accounts?
faqs.answer: Currently, AutoStream plans are for individual creators. Team/agency plans are coming soon.
